title: In Nazaré, Portugal, surfer Sebastian Steudtner rode a 26.2-meter wave, setting
content:
In Nazaré, Portugal, surfer Sebastian Steudtner rode a 26.2-meter wave, setting a new world record for big wave surfing. 

An unbelievable feat!

title:
Gaza surfers seek solace in the sea

Surfers carry their boards past tents and d
content:
Gaza surfers seek solace in the sea

Surfers carry their boards past tents and destroyed buildings on their way to the beach in Gaza City, where they keep surfing despite the risk of Israeli attacks. "It lets us breathe and makes us feel safe," says one surfer
